channel.title: BUhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Best Protein Sources for a Healthy, Balanced Diet
item.description: Looking to add more protein to your meals? Explore high-protein foods, including affordable options, to help meet your daily needs.

item.title: Tips to Help Keep Your Eyes Healthy
Physical and Emotional Symptoms of Depression
The One Neurologist-Approved Workout That's A+ For Better Brain Health
item.description: If these neurologists had to pick a favorite, it would be this.

item.title: Aging-Anxiety Could Actually Be Making You Age Faster, Study Finds
item.description: Making peace with aging could be one of the best things you do for your health

item.title: Eating This Way Could Lower Risk Of Gastric Cancer By Almost 30%, Study Finds
item.description: Yet another reason to adopt the diet.

item.title: 5 Ways To Address Crepey Skin On Your Neck, Backed By Science & A Derm
item.description: Here's a skin care fact for you: The skin on your neck and chest is some of the most delicate, sensitive, and thinnest of the entire body.
